page_metadata.biotools__summary: A structure based multiple RNA aligner. This is a new algorithm that joins the pairwise RNA structure alignments performed by SARA with the multiple sequence T-Coffee framework. SARA-Coffee is part of the T-Coffee distribution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A structure based multiple RNA aligner. This is a new algorithm that joins the pairwise RNA structure alignments performed by SARA with the multiple sequence T-Coffee framework. SARA-Coffee is part of the T-Coffee distribution.
